title: Deliciously Energizing Jamaican Yellow Pepper Curry
description: A fermented, creamy, and energizing Jamaican dish featuring yellow pepper, this curry is a perfect blend of flavors and textures, made in a hot-pot vessel using a bain-marie method to ensure raw-friendly preparation.
instructions: Heat the coconut milk in a hot-pot vessel over low heat using a bain-marie method.
Add the sliced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the coconut milk and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the curry powder, turmeric, salt, and black pepper to the mixture and stir well.
Add the sliced yellow pepper to the mixture and simmer for another 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the mixture to the desired consistency.
Stir in the fermented vegetable paste, if using.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with fresh herbs or a sprinkle of coconut flakes.
